title: United Heroes X
description: A superhero mod with some heroes i made
body:
![UNITED HEROES X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9e3165dbf9e5d3a96b2ba8cf6cc146c970f0a1.png)

**United Heroes X** is a superhero mod that i made, superheroes that will be added were made by me and you wont see them anywhere besides this mod. I might add some superheroes from marvel and dc but we will have to see. Also, i recommend using JEI or other alternative for the recipes, as some are not what you'd expect.

## Planned superheroes:

- Crossfire - A vigilante using guns and swords
- Red Lightning - A speedster, that's it
- Plus evil alternatives
  
  (More heroes will come later)

## Other planned additions

- ~~More fabric colors~~
- More materials and weapons
- Structures

[![Join our Discord!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbda8408b614bac19d673c3bc72f5dd421042e44.png)](https://discord.gg/ctg9UAnU2K)
Any ideas? Post them on our discord server!
